basic_info.description: I am a person driven by curiosity and perseverence, constantly drawn to exploration. Exploration is about seeking truth, which is unchanging and open to everyone. I view blockchain as a technology that guarantees integrity and transparency, essentially a ledger that records truth. Therefore, I want to create useful services with blockchain to contribute to society.

projects.title: Web3 Project: Naegift
projects.description: Naegift is a decentralized gift exchange platform that allows users to create and participate in gift exchanges. Users can perform transactions using MetaMask. The platform's escrow service is built on the Ethereum blockchain and uses smart contracts to manage gift exchanges. The platform also uses decentralized identity and Verifiable Credentials (DID / VC) to manage user identities and ensure privacy, powered by Masca and Veramo.

projects.title: React Project: Stacker-Labs
projects.description: Stacker-Labs is a platform that allows developers to create and share code snippets. Users can create an account, share or search code snippets categorized by tags, and follow other users to communicate. Built with React, Tailwind CSS, and NestJS, the platform also uses Socket.io for real-time chat.

projects.title: Express Project: DevUp
projects.description: DevUp is a platform that allows developers to connect with each other and collaborate on projects. Users can create a profile, search for other developers, and participate in a public chat powered by Socket.io. The platform is built using ExpressJS, rendered by Nunjucks.

projects.title: Kakao Login Process
projects.description: This project is a simple implementation of the Kakao login process using OAuth2.0. The project demonstrates how to authenticate users using Kakao's OAuth2.0 API and retrieve user information. The project is built using Express.js, based on the sequence diagram.

projects.title: Express CRUD Project
projects.description: This project is a simple CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) board application for a bootcamp academy. The project demonstrates how to create a RESTful API with ExpressJS and perform CRUD operations on a database. The project is built using ExpressJS, MySQL, and a hardcoded ORM.

experience.title: Kyungil Game Academy
technologies: React (Hooks, Router, Styled Components, Class and Functional Components)
CRUD Operations, REST APIs, HTTP Protocols
File Handling (Node.js File System, Multer for File Uploading)
Blockchain Technologies (Ethereum, Solidity, Web3.js, ethers.js, Truffle, Ganache, HardHat)
Digital Identity and Cryptography (SSI, DID, VC, Asymmetrical Cryptography)
